description: The ``Clear Dynamic Variables`` node takes in a slot hierarchy and a string literal path of the dynamic space name. For more information, see Dynamic Variables.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Calls an impulse to clear all dynamic variables from a given dynamic space.
fields.Target: The slot hierarchy for this node to look through.
fields.SpaceName: The dynamic space name to find and clear out the dynamic variables from.
fields.OnNotFound: Fires when the path is incorrect or there is nothing to find in the given slot hierarchy.
fields.OnCleared: Fires when the dynamic space name is found and all dynamic variables under that name is removed.
fields.ClearedCount: Returns the number of dynamic variables that have been removed by this node.
